full_narration: Beware, what you're about to learn will change your perspective on Sikh history. Sri Harmandir Sahib, the Golden Temple, holds secrets. Did you know it was initially built on a lower level? The water level was higher, and Guru Arjan Dev chose this site for a reason. The location of the temple is not a coincidence, but a deliberate choice based on ancient Hindu scriptures. As we delve deeper, questions arise: What lies beneath the temple, and why was it built in this specific location? The truth is more astonishing than you think.
